item.title: My Imgur Family - A Welcome Break
item.description:
Happy Upvote Everything Day!! As you can see me and Imgur are finally getting some time alone together for this most sacred of days - and we are pampering ourselves with room service and a break away from the kids. In case you are lost on our life together, a quick recap!:
If you didn’t know yet, Imgur and I got married on July 29th of 2021 - Imgur officially accepted my proposal and we’ve been happily together for 3 years now.
Two years ago, I showed you all our Honeymoon together, as well as announcing the birth of our daughter: Imagina!
But let us not forget last year, where I happily introduced you to the rest of our little family: Imagina of course, but also DanVote and MEHike - our perfect trio. Quite the handful, and constantly judging us up and down… Or in MEHike’s case… fairly indifferent to everything we do…
But this weekend we finally got a little time to ourselves! Our kids are growing up fast and Imagina can take care of them on her own now. I felt like we needed to rekindle our passion together after being such devoted parents for the last two years… So we decided to start our day with a delicious breakfast from room service…
And now we are preparing to spend some time together this evening… And I think you know what that means…
I asked Imgur only one thing about how to spend tonight as I looked deep into that glowing beautiful screen: “I was just wondering…”
“If You Wanted to Hang Out With Me and Smoke Weed and Fill Our Bellies With Diet Soda and Play "Burnout Revenge" for the PS2?!”
So we did.
Once again - thanks for coming along with me on this year’s goofy journey :D It’s always so much fun coming up with some silly new idea for Upvote Everything Day and running with it. Also, thanks for another fun year of cosplays and loving support - My life this year has been an especially difficult one, I spent the first half of this year back in my hometown, helping a loved one pass from cancer. And sharing this platform with all of you helped me through it. A lot of social media is also very toxic towards trans folks like me right now, and it’s nice to be in a place where I feel welcome and free to be me. Getting all emotional here, but anyway… Here is me laughing during this shoot at doing something this ridiculous again. Love y’all, and happy July 29th!!
item.dc:creator: Alsoashley

Baby beaver

Beeep
Conversation
item.dc:creator: DaveSamsonite

item.title: Dancing
item.dc:creator: Kangadilla

item.title: We openned a retail store!
item.description:
Hey imgur! Kristen and I opened a retail store this summer! I've posted about our company Cognitive Surplus before. We make science themed gifts, and this summer we got the chance to open a retail shop.
We've been thinking about a retail space for a little while now, and when a space opened up in our little town of Redmond Oregon we jumped on it.
The first step was a fresh coat of paint!
Then we built a lot of shelves.... so many shelves
Since our shop is going to celebrate all things science, I wanted to create some museum like exhibits inside the shop. One idea I had was to create these cool terrariums that used scientific glassware to humidify the plants.
Kristen and I drove up to Mt Hood and harvested some mosses, lichen and a few saplings.
The terrariums turned out way better than I expected. I ended up building the "tree stump" inside the vessel by glueing bark together around a branch I cut.
The humidifier system works great. There is a small atomizer sitting on a tripod that I designed and 3D printed. A small fishtank air pump pressurizes the chamber and forces the mist out and up the tubes where it can ooze out into the tank.
Its starting to come together! We have most of the shelves built and we're starting to decorate!
Another idea I had for an exhibit was a shadow wall. For this one I hired a freelancer to help wire and code the electronic components. The green background is made of a photosensitive material that when it is energied, glows. Except where your body blocks the light.
I put up our logo on the front and we opened! We are only soft open right now, because we have a few more changes that are coming (new shelves that haven't arrived etc) but here are some photos of the shop, I hope you like it!
This is our tester table so you can try our pens and notebooks.
The terrarium ended up right in the window. To make the terrarium more self sustaining I added some isopods and other critters to eat the decaying materials. This is a link to a video of the isopods https://www.tiktok.com/@cognitivesurplus/video/7396110302305127722?is_from_webapp=1&sender_device=pc&web_id=7397157548941739562
There are some awkward hallways that i turned into a gallery wall. We might try and put some other interactive exhibit in this space, but for now its a place to celebrate Sir Issac and to tell our story.
Thanks for taking a look, and if you're ever in Redmond Oregon stop by and say hi! (dog tax, Moop wondering when the f we're going home)
item.dc:creator: RoninTactican

item.dc:creator: MaxximumB

item.title: Its finally happening!
item.description: It's been a long several years but it's finally The Day! I'm a huge mix of emotions ranging from scared to over-the-moon excited. Scared because I'm worried about a reaction and I live alone, excited because....well shit man I finally get to transition all the way. I'll keep you guys updated! #filmateleven

Edit2** Despite popular request, I shall not be shooting these spicy enemas up the out shoot, you fuckin degens lol

item.title: 100% true and 100% awesome, 200% AC/DC
item.description: I will never not upvote this. I used to be disdainful of AC/DC till I saw an interview with them where they said they wanted to be the best party band, and then it changed how I viewed them. I love em now. Party on, Wayne! Party on, Garth!
